title: egress-gateway Helm chart values
description: Editor-oriented schema for the egress-gateway chart (Istio waypoint egress + kube-ovn VpcEgressGateway). A single egress Gateway with one or more listeners; routes and ServiceEntries are generated per listener.

naming.title: Naming tags
naming.description: Common tags for generating resource names by the convention {instanceTag}-{clusterTag}-{kindShort}-{projectTag}-{name}.

generic.title: Generic settings
generic.description: Common labels/annotations applied to all chart resources.

egressGateway.title: Egress Gateway
egressGateway.description: Single egress gateway. Creates a Gateway (Gateway API, TLS Passthrough) and a same-named ConfigMap (kindShort egw). Per listener a ServiceEntry and one Route are generated.

vpcEgressGateway.title: VPC Egress Gateways
vpcEgressGateway.description: List of VpcEgressGateway (kube-ovn). vpc/externalSubnet/trafficPolicy/nodeSelector/policies are hardcoded in the template; replicas equals the number of externalIPs; selectors are generated to point at the egress gateway. Set name/externalIPs here.

k8sName.description: Kubernetes DNS label: lower-case letters, digits and hyphens; no leading/trailing hyphen.

shortToken.description: DNS token, 2..6 characters: lower-case letters, digits and hyphens; no leading/trailing hyphen.

instanceTag.title: instanceTag
instanceTag.description: Instance tag (table 50). Required, lower-case DNS format.

clusterTag.title: clusterTag
clusterTag.description: Cluster tag (table 52). Required, lower-case DNS format.

projectTag.title: projectTag
projectTag.description: Project tag. Required, 2..6 characters, lower-case DNS format.

labels.title: Common labels
labels.description: Common labels for all chart resources. Result: metadata.labels.

annotations.title: Common annotations
annotations.description: Common annotations for all chart resources. Result: metadata.annotations.

name.title: name
name.description: Gateway name, 2..6 characters. {name} in the Gateway/ConfigMap name (kindShort egw).

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: true = create the Gateway and everything derived from its listeners; false = skip.

listeners.title: Listeners
listeners.description: List of listeners (at least one). Each describes one external service: it generates a Gateway listener, a ServiceEntry and one Route.

name.title: name
name.description: Listener name, 2..6 characters. {name} in the ServiceEntry name, the Gateway listener name and the Route name (parent convention).

hostname.title: hostname
hostname.description: hostname / SNI. Goes into ServiceEntry.hosts, the Route hostnames and the Route backend name.

port.title: port
port.description: Listener and ServiceEntry port; also the Route backend port.

protocol.title: protocol
protocol.description: Listener protocol. Selects the Route kind: TLS -> TLSRoute, HTTPS -> HTTPRoute. tls.mode is always Passthrough.

addresses.title: addresses
addresses.description: Static IPs of the external service. Set -> resolution STATIC + endpoints in ServiceEntry, otherwise -> DNS.

location.title: location
location.description: Position relative to the mesh. Defaults to MESH_EXTERNAL.

resolution.title: resolution
resolution.description: ServiceEntry resolution override. Defaults to STATIC when addresses are set, otherwise DNS.

name.title: name
name.description: Resource name, 2..6 characters. {name} in the VpcEgressGateway name (kindShort veg).

enabled.title: enabled
enabled.description: true = create the VpcEgressGateway; false = skip.

externalIPs.title: externalIPs
externalIPs.description: External egress IP addresses. Required. The number of replicas equals the number of externalIPs.
